name: Rhubarb Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rhubarb with sugar and gelatin; set aside.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl; set aside.
3. Cream butter and sugar in a large mixing bowl; beat in egg.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk and vanilla to the butter mixture. Blend until smooth.
5. Grease a deep-dish pie plate with margarine or butter.
6. Spread the rhubarb mixture on the bottom of the pie plate.
7. Pour batter over the rhubarb.
8. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons cinnamon mixed with 2 tablespoons sugar on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes. Yield: about 12 servings.
